subject: docs(data): add pre-flight checks section to DATA_EXTRACTION.md
body:
Add testable commands to verify API availability, rate limits, network
access, and Supabase readiness before running the full extraction
pipeline. Includes Overpass status check, Nominatim rate limit test,
and a summary table with pass/fail criteria.

Tags: documentation, data, osm, nominatim
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
